from sqlalchemy.orm import Session


class OrderRepository:
    def __init__(self, session: Session):
        self.session = session

    def get_orders_by_user(self, user_id: int):
        return self.session.query(Order).filter(Order.user_id == user_id).all()

    def get_recent_orders(self, days: int):
        cutoff = datetime.utcnow() - timedelta(days=days)
        return self.session.query(Order).filter(Order.created_at >= cutoff).all()

    def get_orders_by_status(self, status: str):
        return self.session.query(Order).filter(Order.status == status).all()
